articles.author: Joe Rossignol
articles.title: Tim Cook Says Two Things Matter Most at Apple Ahead of Company's 50th Anniversary
articles.description: CBS Sunday Morning correspondent David Pogue interviewed Apple's CEO Tim Cook ahead of the company's 50th anniversary on April 1, 2026. In the interview, Cook revealed the two things that are essential to Apple: people and culture. articles.author: Quelian Sanz
articles.title: Después del MacBook Neo, le toca al MacBook Ultra: llevas años esperando esto de Apple
articles.description: El MacBook Neo todavía no ha llegado a las tiendas, pero no es algo que nos impida saber cómo va a ser el próximo portátil de Apple para 2026.
articles.content: El MacBook Neo todavía no ha llegado a las tiendas, pero no es algo que nos impida saber cómo va a ser el próximo portátil de Apple para 2026. Según Mark Gurman, la californiana tiene preparado otro producto de la familia MacBook completamente nuevo.

articles.author: Pedro Goncalves
articles.title: Oil price tops $100 a barrel as Iran war rattles commodity markets
articles.description: The price of oil hit its highest level since the outbreak of the war in Ukraine.
articles.content: Oil prices surged above $100 a barrel on Monday for the first time in four years as the Iran conflict entered its second week, intensifying concerns over disruptions to global energy supplies.
